scenarios.description: children() uses cached childElementsList when invoked a second time without modifications (cache-hit path)
scenarios.precondition: Element with two Element children, no modifications between calls
scenarios.expectedResult: Second children() returns size 2 and contains original children, using cached list internally
pseudocode: // Internally from cache, though list instances differ, childElementsList used cached path

scenarios.description: children() invalidates cache and rebuilds childElementsList when childNodes.modCount changes (cache-miss on modCount mismatch)
scenarios.precondition: Element with two Element children, children() called once to populate cache, then a new child appended to change modCount
scenarios.expectedResult: After modification, children() returns updated list of size 3 and is a different backing childElementsList instance
pseudocode: // childElementsList was rebuilt due to modCount mismatch
